$comment: Draft schema. Not finalized — structure may change.
title: FedRAMP Vulnerability Detail Report (VER-RPT-VDT)
description: Vulnerability detection and response activity report per VER-RPT-VDT. Covers non-accepted vulnerabilities only; see VER-RPT-AVI for accepted vulnerabilities.

reportPeriod.title: Report Period
reportPeriod.description: Period summarized by this report. Per VER-RPT-PER, must cover all activity since the previous report.

vulnerabilities.title: Vulnerabilities
vulnerabilities.description: Non-accepted vulnerabilities with activity in this period.
